examples: Here, a comely woman coach jogs alongside an inmate in the prison yard.
Judge in yourselves: is it comely that a woman pray unto God uncovered?
And there dwell in this comely garden white peacocks and peacocks that have blue breasts.
Today, it is a famously laid-back city that girdles a comely, Sydney-pattern harbour.
In the process of seducing a comely scientist, Maya Hansen (Rebecca Hall), Tony snubs another scientist, Aldrich Killian (Guy Pearce).
